files_updated.change: Added local_package_smoke_matrix completion pointer, eight passed lanes, evidence paths, reuse rule, and claim boundary.
Added local_package_smoke_matrix completion pointer, updated completed_runtime_lane_ids to all eight lanes, and set current_runtime_lane_id to none_local_package_smoke_matrix_complete.

reuse_rule: Do not rerun the repaired local package smoke matrix by default. Reuse the completion evidence unless a workflow, prompt request, package manifest, model/input asset, or QA threshold changes.
claim_boundary: This manifest update makes the completed local package smoke matrix discoverable for orchestration only. It is not final quality certification, exact character/reference identity proof, full-body proof, gold body-mask proof, body/hand/contact geometry authority, target-runtime EC2 proof, or Wave71+ activation.
next_recommended_action: Run the next local-only non-mask orchestration validation, preferably deploy-bundle or matrix quality-run planning, without starting EC2 or promoting masks.
